message.content:
Write 4 React slide components for an AI Agent lecture. Each is a separate .tsx file.

## DESIGN SYSTEM
`{ isActive: boolean }`, `React.memo`, `useGSAP` from `@gsap/react`.
CSS Variables: `--primary`(blue), `--secondary`(cyan), `--accent`(orange), `--bg-primary`, `--bg-secondary`, `--bg-accent`, `--text-primary`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-light`, `--border`, `--success`, `--card-bg`
Tailwind: `text-display-xl`, `text-h1`, `text-h2`, `text-h3`, `text-body`, `text-body-sm`, `text-caption`, `text-data`, `text-data-sm`, `shadow-card`
Components: `FeatureCard` from `@/components/FeatureCard`, `DataCard` from `@/components/DataCard`, `ExpandableSection` from `@/components/ExpandableSection`, `Badge` from `@/components/Badge`, `FlowDiagram` from `@/components/FlowDiagram`

---

## SLIDE 08 — ReAct：当模型拥有了记忆、知识、行动能力
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide08_ReAct.tsx`

**Concept**: Full interactive ReAct cycle simulation WITH tool calls and returns.

### Interactive Demo:
A step-by-step simulation with a "▶ 开始模拟" button. Each step appears sequentially with typing animation:

Step 1 - THINK (蓝):
🧠 思考：用户要求生成网络运维周报。我需要：1) 查询本周告警数据 2) 获取网络性能指标 3) 生成报告

Step 2 - ACT (橙):
⚡ 行动：调用 query_database 工具
📤 请求: { tool: "query_database", sql: "SELECT * FROM alerts WHERE week='current'" }
📥 返回: { rows: 156, critical: 3, warning: 23, normal: 130 }

Step 3 - OBSERVE (绿):
👁 观察：本周共156条告警，其中3条严重、23条警告。严重告警集中在SPN网络。

Step 4-5: Repeat THINK→ACT with another tool call
Step 6: ✅ 任务完成

### Bottom: "ReAct核心：不断思考→调用工具→观察结果→继续思考 的循环"
Use useState for step tracking, GSAP for typing/animation effects.

---

## SLIDE 09 — OpenClaw架构拆解
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide09_OpenClawArch.tsx`

Hero counter: "278,932 GitHub Stars" with counting animation.
Colorful 3-layer architecture diagram (CSS, not FlowDiagram):
- Gateway(蓝) — "大脑，始终运行，协调一切"
- Node(绿) — "手脚，执行具体任务"
- Channel(橙) — "感官，20+平台接入" with platform badges
Animated data flow dots between layers.
Key stats: 13,729 Skills | 100% 开源 | 20+ 平台
ExpandableSection: "OpenClaw设计哲学"

---

## SLIDE 10 — OpenClaw Skills系统
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide10_OpenClawSkills.tsx`

Title: "Skills：连接知识、行动和记忆的桥梁"
Three columns:
1. 解决知识问题🟢: Skills=业务流程"食谱", SKILL.md标准
2. 解决行动问题🟠: Skills=工具"组合配方", Tools vs Skills(厨具vs食谱)
3. 解决记忆问题🔵: 渐进式加载, 2,700 vs 50,000 tokens, 节省94%
Bottom: "ClawHub技能市场：13,729个注册Skills"

---

## SLIDE 11 — OpenClaw记忆系统
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide11_OpenClawMemory.tsx`

Title: "四层记忆系统"
Pyramid (bottom-up GSAP animation):
1. Session(会话层) — 当前对话实时上下文
2. USER(用户层) — 偏好，MEMORY.md持久化
3. TOOLS(工具层) — Skills动态加载
4. SOUL(灵魂层) — Agent身份，永久存储

Right side: Memory retrieval process animation
Detail: 预压缩机制、语义搜索(Embedding+BM25)、200ms延迟
ExpandableSection: "为什么Harness工程(SOUL层)很重要？"

---

Write all 4 files. Chinese text. Rich animations. 200-300 lines each.

attachment.content:
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query: Query the usage information for the current account
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback: Submit case feedback to report issues or suggestions for the current conversation
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query-skill: Run the usage query script to retrieve account usage information for GLM Coding Plan. Only use when invoked by usage-query-agent.
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback-skill: Run the case feedback script to submit feedback for the current conversation. Only use when invoked by case-feedback-agent.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text: 让我阅读现有的幻灯片文件和组件，以便理解其模式。

1 import React, { useRef, memo } from 'react'; 2 import gsap from 'gsap'; 3 import { useGSAP } from '@gsap/react'; 4 import { Brain, Zap, Eye, ArrowRight, RotateCcw, Lightbulb } from 'lucide-react'; 5 import Badge from '@/components/Badge'; 6 import ExpandableSection from '@/components/ExpandableSection'; 7 8 interface SlideProps { 9 isActive: boolean; 10 } 11 12 const CYCLE_STEPS = [ 13 { 14 key: 'think', 15 label: 'THINK', 16 zh: '思考', 17 desc: '分析当前状态，决定下一步行动', 18 icon: Brain, 19 color: 'var(--primary)', 20 bgColor: 'var(--bg-accent)', 21 }, 22 { 23 key: 'act', 24 label: 'ACT', 25 zh: '行动', 26 desc: '调用工具执行操作', 27 icon: Zap, 28 color: 'var(--accent)', 29 bgColor: '#FFF7ED', 30 }, 31 { 32 key: 'observe', 33 label: 'OBSERVE', 34 zh: '观察', 35 desc: '获取执行结果，更新认知', 36 icon: Eye, 37 color: 'var(--secondary)', 38 bgColor: '#ECFDF5', 39 }, 40 ]; 41 42 const EXAMPLE_STEPS = [ 43 { 44 step: 1, 45 type: 'THINK', 46 content: '用户要生成周报，我需要先收集数据', 47 color: 'var(--primary)', 48 }, 49 { 50 step: 2, 51 type: 'ACT', 52 content: '调用数据库API，查询本周运维指标', 53 color: 'var(--accent)', 54 }, 55 { 56 step: 3, 57 type: 'OBSERVE', 58 content: '获取到12项指标数据，异常率2.3%', 59 color: 'var(--secondary)', 60 }, 61 ]; 62 63 const Slide05_ReAct: React.FC = ({ isActive }) => { 64 const containerRef = useRef(null); 65 const loopRef = useRef(null); 66 67 useGSAP( 68 () => { 69 if (!isActive || !containerRef.current) return; 70 71 const ctx = gsap.context(() => { 72 const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.15 }); 73 74 // Title 75 tl.fromTo( 76 '.react-title', 77 { opacity: 0, y: 30 }, 78 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power3.out' } 79 ); 80 81 // Subtitle 82 tl.fromTo( 83 '.react-subtitle', 84 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 85 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 86 '-=0.3' 87 ); 88 89 // Cycle nodes appear one by one 90 tl.fromTo( 91 '.cycle-node', 92 { opacity: 0, scale: 0.5 }, 93 { 94 opacity: 1, 95 scale: 1, 96 duration: 0.5, 97 stagger: 0.2, 98 ease: 'back.out(1.7)', 99 }, 100 '-=0.1' 101 ); 102 103 // Arrows draw in 104 tl.fromTo( 105 '.cycle-arrow', 106 { opacity: 0, scale: 0 }, 107 { 108 opacity: 1, 109 scale: 1, 110 duration: 0.4, 111 stagger: 0.15, 112 ease: 'power2.out', 113 }, 114 '-=0.3' 115 ); 116 117 // Center label 118 tl.fromTo( 119 '.cycle-center', 120 { opacity: 0, scale: 0.8 }, 121 { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 122 '-=0.2' 123 ); 124 125 // Example steps 126 tl.fromTo( 127 '.example-step', 128 { opacity: 0, x: -30 }, 129 { 130 opacity: 1, 131 x: 0, 132 duration: 0.5, 133 stagger: 0.15, 134 ease: 'power3.out', 135 }, 136 '-=0.1' 137 ); 138 139 // Insight panel 140 tl.fromTo( 141 '.insight-panel', 142 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 143 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 144 '-=0.1' 145 ); 146 147 // Expandable 148 tl.fromTo( 149 '.react-expandable', 150 { opacity: 0 }, 151 { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5 }, 152 '-=0.2' 153 ); 154 155 // Continuous subtle pulse on the loop 156 if (loopRef.current) { 157 gsap.to(loopRef.current, { 158 scale: 1.02, 159 duration: 2, 160 ease: 'sine.inOut', 161 yoyo: true, 162 repeat: -1, 163 }); 164 } 165 }, containerRef); 166 167 return () => ctx.revert(); 168 }, 169 { scope: containerRef, dependencies: [isActive] } 170 ); 171 172 return ( 173

436 440 与传统AI的区别 441 442

443 传统AI 444 一次回答，无法修正错误； 445 Agent 446 通过思考-行动-观察循环，迭代执行直到任务完成 447

453 457

458 ReAct（Reasoning + Acting）由Princeton大学和Google Research于2022年联合提出， 459 论文标题为 "ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models"。 460 核心发现：让大语言模型同时进行推理和行动，比纯推理（Chain-of-Thought） 461 或纯行动的效果都要好，显著提升了任务完成率和事实准确性。 462

463 464
465
466
467 ); 468 }; 469 470 export default memo(Slide05_ReAct); 471

276 Peter Steinberger， 277 奥地利知名独立开发者，曾是iOS开发工具PSPDFKit的创始人。2025年底，他看到了AI Agent领域的巨大潜力， 278 决定打造一个真正开放的AI Agent操作系统。 279

280

281 2026年1月，OpenClaw正式在GitHub发布。 282 凭借其优雅的架构设计、对数据主权的坚持、以及对多模型多平台的开放支持， 283 迅速引爆了全球开发者社区。 284

285

286 发布仅 4个月， 287 便登顶GitHub全球Star排行榜，超越了过去十年积累的无数项目， 288 成为开源AI Agent领域的绝对领导者。目前已有超过{' '} 289 3,500+ 位开发者参与了代码贡献。 290

Pyramid layers — bottom up (Session → USER → TOOLS → SOUL) 60 tl.fromTo( 61 '.slide08-layer-session', 62 { opacity: 0, x: -60, scaleY: 0.5, transformOrigin: 'center bottom' }, 63 { opacity: 1, x: 0, scaleY: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(1.3)' }, 64 0.6 65 ); 66 67 tl.fromTo( 68 '.slide08-layer-user', 69 { opacity: 0, x: -60, scaleY: 0.5, transformOrigin: 'center bottom' }, 70 { opacity: 1, x: 0, scaleY: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(1.3)' }, 71 0.85 72 ); 73 74 tl.fromTo( 75 '.slide08-layer-tools', 76 { opacity: 0, x: -60, scaleY: 0.5, transformOrigin: 'center bottom' }, 77 { opacity: 1, x: 0, scaleY: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(1.3)' }, 78 1.1 79 ); 80 81 tl.fromTo( 82 '.slide08-layer-soul', 83 { opacity: 0, x: -60, scaleY: 0.5, transformOrigin: 'center bottom' }, 84 { opacity: 1, x: 0, scaleY: 1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'back.out(1.3)' }, 85 1.35 86 ); 87 88 // 5. Insight panel 89 tl.fromTo( 90 '.slide08-insight', 91 { opacity: 0, x: 40 }, 92 { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out' }, 93 1.7 94 ); 95 96 // 6. Insight items staggered 97 tl.fromTo( 98 '.slide08-insight-item', 99 { opacity: 0, y: 15 }, 100 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.1, ease: 'power3.out' }, 101 2.0 102 ); 103 104 // 7. Expandable section 105 tl.fromTo( 106 '.slide08-expandable', 107 { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, 108 { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power3.out' }, 109 2.5 110 ); 111 }, containerRef); 112 113 return () => ctx.revert(); 114 }, 115 { scope: containerRef, dependencies: [isActive] } 116 ); 117 118 // Layer color configs 119 const layerConfig = { 120 soul: { 121 gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B35, #FF9A56)', 122 icon: Sparkles, 123 tagColor: '#FF6B35', 124 }, 125 tools: { 126 gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0066CC, #3399FF)', 127 icon: Wrench, 128 tagColor: '#0066CC', 129 }, 130 user: { 131 gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #00B4D8, #48CAE4)', 132 icon: User, 133 tagColor: '#00B4D8', 134 }, 135 session: { 136 gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #2EC4B6, #5DD9CD)', 137 icon: MessageCircle, 138 tagColor: '#2EC4B6', 139 }, 140 }; 141 142 return ( 143
148
149 {/* Badge */} 150
151 152 153 核心架构 154 155
156 157 {/* Title */} 158

159 四层记忆系统 160

161

383 没有记忆的Agent每次对话都是「失忆」状态 384 — 它不知道你是谁、不知道你的偏好、不记得上一轮对话说了什么。 385 每一次交互都要从零开始，这对于企业场景是不可接受的。 386

387

388 OpenClaw的四层记忆系统解决了这个根本问题： 389 SOUL层让Agent拥有稳定的「人格」， 390 TOOLS层让它知道自己会什么， 391 USER层让它记住每个用户的独特需求， 392 Session层则保证当前对话的连贯性。 393

394

395 更关键的是，OpenClaw的预压缩机制确保即使在超长对话中，Agent也不会因为上下文窗口溢出而「遗忘」。 396 配合Embedding+BM25混合检索，在{' '} 397 200ms 内就能从海量记忆中精准找到相关信息。 398

399
400 401
402
403
404 ); 405 }; 406 407 export default memo(Slide08_OpenClaw2); 408

405 409 410 {pillar.label} 411 412
413 ); 414 })} 415
416
417 418 {/* Expandable Section */} 419
420 424
425

426 OpenClaw秉承Unix哲学： 427 做一件事，做到极致。整个系统只有 4个核心工具： 428 Read、Write、Edit、Bash。听起来简单得不可思议，但这正是其强大之处。 429

430

431 通过这4个原子操作的组合，Agent可以完成从文件管理、代码编写、系统运维到数据分析的几乎所有任务。 432 复杂功能不是通过堆砌内置工具实现的，而是通过{' '} 433 Skills机制 让社区自由扩展。 434

435

436 这种「少即是多」的设计让OpenClaw的核心极其稳定可靠，同时通过Skills生态保持无限的可扩展性。 437 每个Skill都是一个独立的沙箱，不会影响核心系统的安全性 — 这也是为什么即使ClawHub上存在恶意Skills， 438 OpenClaw的核心架构依然安全。 439

440
441 442
443
444
445 ); 446 }; 447 448 export default memo(Slide09_OpenClaw3); 449

content.text:
我需要创建文件的权限。`Write` 工具和 `Bash` 工具目前都被拒绝了。这些是创建你请求的四个新的 `.tsx` 幻灯片文件所必需的工具。

以下是我尝试执行的操作：

**我需要创建 4 个文件：**

1. `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide08_ReAct.tsx` -- 带有逐步模拟、打字动画、用于步骤跟踪的 `useState` 和代码块显示的交互式 `ReAct` 循环。

2. `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide09_OpenClawArch.tsx` -- 带有 CSS 的英雄计数器（278,932 星，带计数动画）、3 层架构（`Gateway`/`Node`/`Channel`）、平台徽章、动画数据流点。

3. `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide10_OpenClawSkills.tsx` -- 三列布局，展示技能如何解决知识/行动/内存问题，包含 `SKILL.md` 标准、`Tools` 与 `Skills` 比喻和 `token` 节省指标。

4. `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide11_OpenClawMemory.tsx` -- 4 层金字塔（`Session`/`USER`/`TOOLS`/`SOUL`），带有自下而上的 `GSAP` 动画，右侧内存检索过程，`200ms` 延迟详情。

**为什么需要这些工具：** 这些是全新的文件，目前磁盘上不存在。`Write` 工具是创建文件的主要机制，而 `Bash` 是一种替代方案（例如，通过 `cat >` 或 `tee` 重定向写入）。没有它们，我无法创建新文件。

你能否授予 `Write` 或 `Bash` 的权限，以便我继续操作？
